allow: Bash(bun -e "import {youtubeTranscriptTool as t} from './src/mcp/youtube.ts'; const r=await t.handler\({url:'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2n41YjR5QfU'}\); console.log\('isError:', r.isError??false\); console.log\(r.content[0].text.slice\(0,200\)\);")

Bash(bun -e "import {youtubeTranscriptTool as t} from './src/mcp/youtube.ts'; const r=await t.handler\({url:'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2n41YjR5QfU', lang:'zz'}\); console.log\('isError:', r.isError??false\); console.log\(r.content[0].text.slice\(0,160\)\);")

Bash(bun -e "import {youtubeTranscriptTool as t} from './src/mcp/youtube.ts'; const r=await t.handler\({url:'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2n41YjR5QfU'}\); console.log\('isError:', r.isError??false\); console.log\(r.content[0].text.slice\(0,140\)\);")
Bash(bun -e "const j=JSON.parse\(await Bun.stdin.text\(\)\); console.log\('manual:', Object.keys\(j.subtitles||{}\).length, '| auto:', Object.keys\(j.automatic_captions||{}\).length\);")

Bash(bun -e "import {youtubeTranscriptTool as t} from './src/mcp/youtube.ts'; const r=await t.handler\({url:'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2n41YjR5QfU', lang:'en', max_chars:200000}\); await Bun.write\('/tmp/yt-transcript.txt', r.content[0].text\); console.log\('written chars:', r.content[0].text.length\);")

Bash(bun -e "import {youtubeTranscriptTool as t} from './src/mcp/youtube.ts'; const r=await t.handler\({url:'https://youtu.be/aircAruvnKk'}\); console.log\('isError:', r.isError??false\); console.log\(r.content[0].text.slice\(0,100\)\);")
